parts.text:
<system-reminder># System Information

Operating System: linux
Default Shell: 
Home Directory: /root
Current Working Directory: /home/user/repo
Current Time: Wed Mar 11 2026 16:24:11 GMT+0000 (Coordinated Universal Time)

# Current Working Directory (/home/user/repo) Files
.jj
src
src/core.py
src/config.py
src/utils.py

# GIT STATUS
Current branch: HEAD
Main branch (you will usually use this for PRs): 

Recent commits:
d992ecb chore: add config module
d02c9f7 chore: add utils module
a00e3fd chore: initial project setup

# TODOs
No TODOs yet, if you are working on tasks that would benefit from a todo list please use the todoWrite tool to create one.</system-reminder>

The repository at `/home/user/repo` has bookmarks `main`, `feature-a`, `feature-b`, and `feature-c` with overlapping ancestry. Write a script that uses `jj` revsets to analyze the ancestry relationships and output a report to `/home/user/ancestry_report.txt`. The report must cover: (1) commits in `feature-a` not reachable from `main`, (2) commits present in the ancestry of all three feature branches, (3) the merge base between `feature-a` and `feature-b`, and (4) commits that modified `src/core.py` across any feature branch.
Let me explore the repository structure and understand the jj setup before writing the script.

input.command: cd /home/user/repo && jj log --no-pager -r 'all()' --template 'commit_id ++ " " ++ bookmarks ++ " " ++ description ++ "\n"' 2>&1 | head -60

output.output:
@  159d338d65de1a3499e9aeb9265c939f9cc8d20f
│ ○  44037c785806691632251460b7ba016d9b605d21 feature-b feat: feature-b modifies core
│ │
│ ○  53292c87466a619ac8c30f165a67f5461a75959f  feat: feature-b adds dedicated module
├─╯
│ ○  6ba75fdcd7588c7fe550258b491cc5c0fb830221 feature-c feat: feature-c modifies core too
│ │
│ ○  97143b57e06760f0f76314eb3fa5153b18dc9777  feat: feature-c adds dedicated module
│ │
│ ○  b4e9f7e3c0b05622a9530d8b53e220d4a7ca0290 feature-a feat: feature-a extends core with helper
│ │
│ ○  6c2feaa8c86a3272a33037c8a22f4c45c46d6dee  feat: feature-a adds dedicated module
│ │
│ ○  bd4b5c3f8966ee57e1b1717d026d75904102bc0c  feat: feature-a adds core function
├─╯
○  d992ecbc2508e222b02dd3b6f3c8bcf7b5ac53c6 main chore: add config module
│
○  d02c9f70f9766757e6001e4518944424cd75db13  chore: add utils module
│
○  a00e3fdf567a55f2c5040d0aac4588747e97f7c5  chore: initial project setup
│
◆  0000000000000000000000000000000000000000

output.content:
# core module v1
def init(): pass

output.output:
@  159d338d65de1a3499e9aeb9265c939f9cc8d20f |  |
│ ○  44037c785806691632251460b7ba016d9b605d21 | feature-b | feat: feature-b modifies core
│ │
│ ○  53292c87466a619ac8c30f165a67f5461a75959f |  | feat: feature-b adds dedicated module
├─╯
│ ○  6ba75fdcd7588c7fe550258b491cc5c0fb830221 | feature-c | feat: feature-c modifies core too
│ │
│ ○  97143b57e06760f0f76314eb3fa5153b18dc9777 |  | feat: feature-c adds dedicated module
│ │
│ ○  b4e9f7e3c0b05622a9530d8b53e220d4a7ca0290 | feature-a | feat: feature-a extends core with helper
│ │
│ ○  6c2feaa8c86a3272a33037c8a22f4c45c46d6dee |  | feat: feature-a adds dedicated module
│ │
│ ○  bd4b5c3f8966ee57e1b1717d026d75904102bc0c |  | feat: feature-a adds core function
├─╯
○  d992ecbc2508e222b02dd3b6f3c8bcf7b5ac53c6 | main | chore: add config module
│
○  d02c9f70f9766757e6001e4518944424cd75db13 |  | chore: add utils module
│
○  a00e3fdf567a55f2c5040d0aac4588747e97f7c5 |  | chore: initial project setup
│
◆  0000000000000000000000000000000000000000 |  |

input.command:
cd /home/user/repo && echo "--- Test revsets ---" && jj log --no-pager -r 'ancestors(feature-a) & ancestors(feature-b) & ancestors(feature-c)' --template 'commit_id ++ " " ++ description ++ "
"' 2>&1 && echo "--- merge base ---" && jj log --no-pager -r 'latest(ancestors(feature-a) & ancestors(feature-b))' --template 'commit_id ++ " " ++ description ++ "
"' 2>&1 && echo "--- files ---" && jj log --no-pager -r 'feature-a::feature-c' --template 'commit_id ++ " " ++ description ++ "
"' 2>&1

output.output:
--- Test revsets ---
○  d992ecbc2508e222b02dd3b6f3c8bcf7b5ac53c6 chore: add config module
│
○  d02c9f70f9766757e6001e4518944424cd75db13 chore: add utils module
│
○  a00e3fdf567a55f2c5040d0aac4588747e97f7c5 chore: initial project setup
│
◆  0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
--- merge base ---
○  d992ecbc2508e222b02dd3b6f3c8bcf7b5ac53c6 chore: add config module
│
~
--- files ---
○  6ba75fdcd7588c7fe550258b491cc5c0fb830221 feat: feature-c modifies core too
│
○  97143b57e06760f0f76314eb3fa5153b18dc9777 feat: feature-c adds dedicated module
│
○  b4e9f7e3c0b05622a9530d8b53e220d4a7ca0290 feat: feature-a extends core with helper
│
~

input.command: cd /home/user/repo && jj log --no-pager -r 'feature-a:: | feature-b:: | feature-c::' 2>&1 | head -5 ; jj log --no-pager -r 'diff_contains("src/core.py")' 2>&1 | head -20

output.output:
○  ltomrmtn test@example.com 2026-03-11 12:33:39 feature-c 6ba75fdc
│  feat: feature-c modifies core too
○  pplxmrlu test@example.com 2026-03-11 12:33:39 97143b57
│  feat: feature-c adds dedicated module
○  rwlysmsw test@example.com 2026-03-11 12:33:38 feature-a b4e9f7e3
Warning: In revset expression
 --> 1:1
  |
1 | diff_contains("src/core.py")
  | ^-----------^
  |
  = diff_contains() is deprecated; use diff_lines() instead

input.command: cd /home/user/repo && jj log --no-pager -r 'diff_lines("src/core.py")' --template 'commit_id ++ " " ++ bookmarks ++ " " ++ description ++ "\n"' 2>&1 && echo "---" && jj log --no-pager -r '(feature-a::) ~ (main::)' --template 'commit_id ++ "\n"' 2>&1

output.output:
○  6ba75fdcd7588c7fe550258b491cc5c0fb830221 feature-c feat: feature-c modifies core too
│
○  97143b57e06760f0f76314eb3fa5153b18dc9777  feat: feature-c adds dedicated module
│
○  b4e9f7e3c0b05622a9530d8b53e220d4a7ca0290 feature-a feat: feature-a extends core with helper
│
○  6c2feaa8c86a3272a33037c8a22f4c45c46d6dee  feat: feature-a adds dedicated module
│
○  bd4b5c3f8966ee57e1b1717d026d75904102bc0c  feat: feature-a adds core function
│
~

○  44037c785806691632251460b7ba016d9b605d21 feature-b feat: feature-b modifies core
│
○  53292c87466a619ac8c30f165a67f5461a75959f  feat: feature-b adds dedicated module
│
~

input.command: cd /home/user/repo && echo "=== feature-a not in main ===" &
